knowledge_first: Call get_td_project_context before live project work.
Call query_td_knowledge before writing TouchDesigner Python, GLSL, or creating operators.
Discover the live root with query_network before assuming the configured paths are loaded.
canonical_native_build: Run touchdesigner/scripts/build_project.py only in a blank disposable TouchDesigner project.
Inspect build/touchdesigner-build-report.json for builder, shader, and preview errors.
Run tools/record_native_validation.py only after reviewing the native build.
Run tools/verify_repository.py after generated files are synchronized.
development_harness: Save a separate local project as integrations/embody/local/TD_ImageFX_DevHarness.toe.
Install Embody in that local project and enable Envoy on 127.0.0.1.
Run touchdesigner/scripts/install_dev_harness.py to load the tracked core components.
Do not run the canonical native builder in the Embody harness.
live_audit: Inspect recursive errors and warnings on the library and demo.
Capture and assess every approved output.
Record final project performance and investigate regressions.

prohibited_actions: Do not save the Embody harness over TD_ImageFX_Library.toe.
Do not place Embody inside the canonical builder project.
Do not externalize or rewrite immutable package .tox versions.
Do not approve changed visual baselines without human visual review.
Do not download, install, activate, or execute update candidates during an automatic check.
mutation_policy: Use Envoy mutations only after explicit authorization.
Claim the intended scope before a multi-session write.
Keep experiments under /project1/imagefx_sandbox or in a disposable harness.
Use one undoable batch for related changes and check errors immediately afterward.

order: Confirm the live TouchDesigner build and selected Envoy instance.
Confirm the ImageFX project context is configured.
Discover and inspect the two managed roots.
Check recursive operator errors, warnings, and script errors.
Capture demo, rack, and browser preview TOPs with quality assessment.
pass_criteria: TouchDesigner build is 2025.32820 or a deliberately qualified newer build.
HealthCheck reports 96 current packages and 124 immutable versions with no missing entrypoints.
Managed roots report no operator, warning, or script messages.
All eight approved TOPs exist, cook, have usable resolution, and are neither black nor fully transparent.
The primary demo output matches its selected HD, 4K UHD, or custom resolution.
No unexplained frame drops, memory spike, or material frame-time regression is introduced.
